forbidden_scope: True write executor, write operation execution, real browser execution, or generic browser agent loop
Approval UI, approval persistence, idempotency implementation, post-check implementation, reconciliation implementation, or unknown-outcome write recovery
Formal product CLI, SDK/MCP full entrypoints, generated clients, API submission endpoint, or App UI
History list/search/filtering, database/ORM/migration tooling, multi-backend abstraction, hosted service storage, or result store
Browser/runtime executor, Harbor SDK/runtime calls, raw evidence retrieval, live sessions, or Harbor package imports
Harbor, Lode, App, or other repository changes

integration_evidence.summary: Preserves task policy risk/intent enums and records non-read policy requests as failed/deferred Run Records before Lode/Harbor admission or any executor path.
Validates true-write deferred, preview/action-request deferred, Lode write-mode deferred, queryable failure envelope, and unchanged read-only acceptance.
Adds a reusable failed/deferred Run Record fixture for true-write submission guardrail with `deferred_true_write` admission and `action_risk` failure.
Seeds the guardrail fixture into a file-backed Run Record store and verifies existing run/result/evidence query helpers can read it.
Documents the deferred guardrail behavior and explicitly excludes true-write execution.

suite_path_consumption.rationale: Bounded Core guardrail over existing task policy, Run Record, failure, result, evidence-ref, and query contracts without a write protocol implementation, approval flow, executor, API submission endpoint, App UI, storage backend, or cross-repo dependency.
suite_path_consumption.consumer_boundary: Review and PR Ready consume ADR 0004/0005/0008, existing GH-101 through GH-109 contracts, the guardrail fixture, local build/typecheck/test/lint output, PR metadata readback, and hosted checks.
suite_path_consumption.recheck_condition: Upgrade to broader suite artifacts when true-write execution, approval persistence/UI, idempotency store, post-check/reconciliation, generated clients, App integration, storage backends, hosted service storage, or cross-repo protocol changes are added.

commands.note: Validated Run Record store and task submission admission, including true-write deferred, preview/action-request deferred, Lode write-mode deferred, queryable failure envelope, and unchanged read-only acceptance.
Validated conformance fixtures with 4 schemas, 7 fixtures, and 5 Run Records, including the queryable write guardrail fixture.
Validated workspace self-checks, including schemas, Core runtime, API Server, and conformance.
Validated conformance fixtures with 4 schemas, 7 fixtures, and 5 Run Records.
Validated existing API/CLI smoke against golden run run_fixture_success_001 after guardrail changes.
Installed surface diagnostics passed; CLI version freshness was advisory stale but non-blocking.
Evidence map has present behavior, fixture, test, doc, and fresh verification evidence.

Consumer repo has no tools/ directory; tools/skills_surface.py check, tools/loom_check.py --profile source --source-surface contract-only, tools/check_release_surface.py, tools/version_surface_check.py, and tools/check_npm_package.py are absent.

remaining_risks: GH-110 intentionally records guardrail failures only; approval UI, idempotency, post-check, reconciliation, true-write execution, generated clients, and App integration remain out of scope.
Parent FR #96 and milestone #9 closeout remain pending until GH-110 is merged, closed, and GitHub issue state confirms no remaining open sub-issues.
